tool_purpose: DeepLabv3 is an image segmentation model for TensorFlow Hub that assigns semantic labels to every pixel of an input image. It is based on the DeepLabv3 architecture and trained on the PASCAL VOC 2012 dataset. Framework: TensorFlow Hub. Functionality: Semantic image segmentation. API call: hub.KerasLayer('https://tfhub.dev/tensorflow/deeplabv3/1', output_key='SemanticPredictions').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
doc_snippets: DeepLabv3 is an image segmentation model for TensorFlow Hub that assigns semantic labels to every pixel of an input image. It is based on the DeepLabv3 architecture and trained on the PASCAL VOC 2012 dataset. Framework: TensorFlow Hub. Functionality: Semantic image segmentation. API call: hub.KerasLayer('https://tfhub.dev/tensorflow/deeplabv3/1', output_key='SemanticPredictions').
